data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for QR code generation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'QR code generation for physical distribution'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of QR code generation. The linked use case mentions this need but lacks the necessary details to assert its implementation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of QR code generation for physical distribution.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the QR code generation requirement.
